lines: The United States takes on Bosnia‑Herzegovina on Wednesday at 8 PM ET.
The Indiana Fever beat the Los Angeles Sparks 111‑87 yesterday and improve to 11‑8, third in the Eastern Conference.
The Indianapolis Indians edged the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders 4‑3 yesterday.
The Indians host the RailRiders again today at 1:35 PM ET.
escape_hatch: I mostly just catch the highlights, honestly.

speech: Here's the sports talk for Indianapolis, Sunday, June 28. The United States takes on Bosnia‑Herzegovina on Wednesday at 8 PM ET. The Indiana Fever beat the Los Angeles Sparks 111‑87 yesterday and improve to 11‑8, third in the Eastern Conference. The Indianapolis Indians edged the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders 4‑3 yesterday. The Indians host the RailRiders again today at 1:35 PM ET. And if it gets away from you, your out is: I mostly just catch the highlights, honestly.
